untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detecting 'non-confirmation of feared direction' and 'fundamental or technical risk validation' which are qualitative, subjective assessments not expressible through standard technical indicators. The core logic of holding positions when risks fail to materialize requires real-time risk event detection and position tracking that cannot be encoded as simple indicator comparisons.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using bounce/hold logic (close above/below previous bars), but this does not capture the nuanced risk confirmation/non-confirmation mechanic central to the signal. The signal relies on trader judgment regarding position risk and market validation of that risk, which is outside the scope of indicator-based rules.
